validationRecipes.name: default
validationRecipes.purpose: Run the repository default correctness gate before reporting completion.

validationRecipes.name: agent-contract
validationRecipes.command: pwsh -NoProfile -ExecutionPolicy Bypass -File tools/check-ai-integration.ps1; pwsh -NoProfile -ExecutionPolicy Bypass -File tools/check-json-contracts.ps1
validationRecipes.purpose: Validate AI instructions, manifests, schemas, and generated context.

validationRecipes.name: public-api-boundary
validationRecipes.purpose: Check public headers and backend interop boundaries after public API or handle-boundary changes.

validationRecipes.name: win32-platform
validationRecipes.command: pwsh -NoProfile -ExecutionPolicy Bypass -File tools/cmake.ps1 --build --preset dev --target MK_win32_platform_tests MK_runtime_ui_workbench_tests MK_runtime_ui_production_stack_tests; pwsh -NoProfile -ExecutionPolicy Bypass -File tools/ctest.ps1 --preset dev --output-on-failure -R "win32_platform|runtime_ui"; pwsh -NoProfile -ExecutionPolicy Bypass -File tools/check-public-api-boundaries.ps1
validationRecipes.purpose: Build and test the Windows-native platform foundation, including Win32 runtime/window/message-pump/cursor rows, keyboard/mouse input rows, clipboard/file-dialog/text-input rows, runtime UI contract interaction, and public API boundary checks.

validationRecipes.name: desktop-gui
validationRecipes.purpose: Build and test optional SDL3, Dear ImGui, editor, and SDL3 audio adapter code.

validationRecipes.name: desktop-game-runtime
validationRecipes.purpose: Build and test optional SDL3 desktop game runtime host code through the SDL3-only desktop-runtime preset, including manifest-linked generated registered-game metadata with package file path validation, SDL3 platform/audio tests, runtime host tests, the SDL event pump, reusable SdlDesktopGameHost tests, SDL presentation fallback/required-bytecode tests, finite sample_desktop_runtime_shell smoke execution, DXC-available build-output DXIL shader artifact smoke, DXC SPIR-V CodeGen-available build-output SPIR-V shader artifact smoke, non-shell sample_desktop_runtime_game smoke execution, sample_generated_desktop_runtime_package config-only scaffold smoke execution, sample_generated_desktop_runtime_cooked_scene_package cooked-scene scaffold smoke execution, sample_generated_desktop_runtime_material_shader_package material/shader scaffold smoke execution, and DXC-available sample_generated_desktop_runtime_material_shader_package_shader_artifacts_smoke source-tree shader-artifact execution. Real-window SDL3/D3D12 or SDL3/Vulkan renderer smokes remain explicit local commands because they open a native desktop window.

validationRecipes.name: desktop-runtime-release-package
validationRecipes.purpose: Build the optional Release desktop runtime package, install the selected registered runtime game executable, SDL3 runtime DLL, selected package files, generated desktop-runtime game package metadata with gameManifest and packageFiles paths derived from manifest-driven or literal registration, optional generated D3D12 DXIL and Vulkan SPIR-V shader artifacts for the current sample shell shader-artifact package path, validate installed SDK metadata, validate a clean installed consumer, validate the installed selected game manifest, package files, shader artifacts, and smoke from metadata, including selected-target cooked package load and renderer-submit proofs when the game metadata requires them, and create the CPack package artifact.

validationRecipes.name: desktop-runtime-shell-vulkan-window-smoke
validationRecipes.purpose: On a Windows host with Vulkan runtime, surface support, and generated SPIR-V artifacts, validate the SDL3/Vulkan game-window RhiFrameRenderer path without exposing Vulkan or SDL handles to gameplay.

validationRecipes.name: desktop-runtime-generated-scaffold-package
validationRecipes.purpose: Build the selected generated desktop runtime package scaffold lane and validate installed sample_generated_desktop_runtime_package with manifest-derived runtime config package files, metadata-selected --require-config smoke args, and deterministic NullRenderer fallback without D3D12/Vulkan shader artifacts or cooked-scene claims.

validationRecipes.name: desktop-runtime-generated-cooked-scene-scaffold-package
validationRecipes.purpose: Build the selected generated desktop runtime cooked-scene package scaffold lane and validate installed sample_generated_desktop_runtime_cooked_scene_package with manifest-derived config, .geindex, first-party cooked texture/mesh/material/scene files, metadata-selected --require-config plus --require-scene-package smoke args, runtime package loading, renderer-neutral scene submission counters, and deterministic NullRenderer fallback without D3D12/Vulkan shader artifacts or scene GPU binding claims.

validationRecipes.name: desktop-runtime-2d-package-proof
validationRecipes.purpose: Build the selected 2D desktop runtime package proof and validate installed sample_2d_desktop_runtime_package with manifest-derived config, .geindex, first-party cooked texture/material/audio/scene files, metadata-selected --require-config plus --require-scene-package smoke args, cooked package loading, playable 2D scene validation, sprite/HUD/audio counters, packaged D3D12 DXIL shader artifacts, host-gated D3D12 package window smoke, --require-native-2d-sprites native 2D sprite batch execution counters such as native_2d_sprite_batches_executed and native_2d_sprite_batch_texture_binds, --require-world-region-streaming counters for reviewed region load/keep/unload safe-point rows, budget evidence, missing-region diagnostics, reviewed package adoption, RuntimeWorldStreamingLargeSceneReadinessReport status, and navigation path-cache readiness evidence, plus --require-simulation-orchestration gameplay_runtime_scheduler_* counters for deterministic fixed-tick scheduler order, budget-limited steps, command rows, replay hash evidence, world_entity_model_* counters for stable entity/component/region ownership, lifecycle rows, persistence/streaming bridge rows, duplicate rejection, invalid-request bridge rejection diagnostics, fail-closed row suppression, and addressable_content_* counters for address/dependency/refcount/load/release rows, resident bytes, budget-limited rejection diagnostics, no package IO, no async execution, no commit, and clean diagnostics without runtime image decoding and production atlas/editor/runtime integration beyond the reviewed source-image decode and atlas-packing tools, public native/RHI handles, Metal, broad background package streaming, broad production sprite batching readiness, open-world parity, platform async job systems, broad gameplay-rule scheduling execution, rollback/lockstep execution, lifecycle execution, resident mutation, scene mutation, or broad renderer-quality claims.

validationRecipes.name: desktop-runtime-2d-runtime-ui-production-stack-proof
validationRecipes.purpose: Build the selected 2D desktop runtime package proof and validate Runtime UI Production Stack Evidence v1 through --require-runtime-ui-production-stack counters, including shaping direction/script/language rows, glyph ids/clusters/advances/offsets/fallback/bidi/line-break evidence, glyph bitmap/metrics/pixel-format rows, atlas placement/budget/eviction rows, renderer upload handoff, IME session begin/end, composition, candidate, text-area/cursor, committed text, clipboard, selected SDL3 adapter proof, per-platform host gates, accessibility role/name/description/state/focus/action/relationship/live-region/keyboard-pattern/publication-status rows, Microsoft UI Automation host gates, accessibility per-platform host gates, dependency/host gates, unsupported-claim rejection, runtime_ui_production_stack_status=host_evidence_required, reviewed selected package evidence, six rows, four ready rows, two host-gated rows, zero dependency-gated/skipped/adapter-invoked/unsupported rows, runtime_ui_production_stack_ime_sdl3_adapter_proof_rows=1, runtime_ui_production_stack_ime_platform_host_gate_rows=1, runtime_ui_production_stack_ime_platform_parity_ready=0, runtime_ui_production_stack_accessibility_uia_host_gate_rows=1, runtime_ui_production_stack_accessibility_platform_host_gate_rows=1, runtime_ui_production_stack_accessibility_platform_parity_ready=0, zero adapter/native/renderer-upload invocation fields, zero diagnostics, and a positive replay hash without claiming production text shaping, real font loading/rasterization, native IME parity, OS accessibility publication, renderer texture upload execution, UI middleware, or broad platform UI parity.

validationRecipes.name: desktop-runtime-2d-runtime-ui-renderer-atlas-handoff-proof
validationRecipes.purpose: Build the selected 2D desktop runtime package proof and validate Runtime UI Renderer Atlas Handoff v1 through --require-runtime-ui-renderer-atlas-handoff counters, including runtime/assets/2d/hud.uiatlas, runtime_ui_renderer_atlas_handoff_status=ready, one image atlas page/binding, one glyph atlas page/binding, two placement rows, two budget rows, one texture handoff row, one renderer counter row, two renderer sprites submitted, zero unresolved resources, zero unsupported claims, zero side effects, zero renderer upload invocation, zero diagnostics, and a positive replay hash without claiming renderer texture upload execution, source image decoding, live glyph atlas generation, font loading/rasterization, text shaping, native/RHI handles, or broad UI renderer quality.

validationRecipes.name: desktop-runtime-2d-vulkan-window-package
validationRecipes.purpose: On a ready Windows/Vulkan host with DXC SPIR-V CodeGen and spirv-val, build the selected 2D desktop runtime package proof and validate installed sample_2d_desktop_runtime_package with packaged SPIR-V shader artifacts, --require-vulkan-renderer smoke args, presentation_selected=vulkan, cooked 2D scene validation, sprite/HUD/audio counters, and no public native/RHI handle exposure. This remains a strict host/toolchain-gated presentation smoke, not broad production sprite batching readiness, Metal, or broad renderer-quality readiness.

validationRecipes.name: desktop-runtime-generated-material-shader-scaffold-package
validationRecipes.purpose: Build the selected generated desktop runtime material/shader scaffold lane and validate installed sample_generated_desktop_runtime_material_shader_package with manifest-derived config and cooked scene package files, source material/HLSL authoring inputs kept out of runtimePackageFiles, target-specific D3D12 scene/postprocess DXIL artifacts, host-owned D3D12 scene GPU bindings, Frame Graph/Postprocess v0 status through backend-neutral presentation report fields, and modern material package counters including modern_material_variants=1, modern_material_ready=1, modern_material_diagnostics=0, modern_material_texture_dependencies=1, modern_material_shader_evidence_ready=1, modern_material_d3d12_shader_evidence_ready=1, modern_material_vulkan_shader_evidence_ready=0, and modern_material_selected_shader_evidence_ready=1. The source-tree counterpart is covered by the desktop-game-runtime recipe through the DXC-available sample_generated_desktop_runtime_material_shader_package_shader_artifacts_smoke CTest.

validationRecipes.name: desktop-runtime-generated-material-shader-scaffold-package-vulkan-strict
validationRecipes.purpose: On a ready Windows/Vulkan host with DXC SPIR-V CodeGen and spirv-val, build and validate installed sample_generated_desktop_runtime_material_shader_package with packaged SPIR-V scene/postprocess artifacts, presentation_selected=vulkan, --require-vulkan-renderer, --require-scene-gpu-bindings, --require-postprocess, modern_material_vulkan_shader_evidence_ready=1, and modern_material_selected_shader_evidence_ready=1, matching the per-game desktop-runtime-release-target-vulkan-toolchain-gated recipe row. This is strict toolchain/package evidence for the material/shader scaffold lane aligned to editor material-preview Vulkan readiness workstreams; it does not claim full mirakana_editor material-preview display parity or cross-backend visual equivalence.

validationRecipes.name: desktop-runtime-sample-game-scene-gpu-package
validationRecipes.purpose: Build the selected non-shell desktop runtime package lane and validate installed sample_desktop_runtime_game with packaged config, cooked scene package loading, target-specific scene/postprocess/shadow/UI-overlay DXIL artifacts by default, metadata-selected --require-d3d12-renderer smoke args, --require-scene-gpu-bindings, --require-postprocess-depth-input, --require-directional-shadow, --require-directional-shadow-filtering, --require-d3d12-shadow-cascade-policy, --require-lighting-shadow-policy, --require-scene-scale-policy, --require-d3d12-instanced-draw-evidence, --require-gpu-memory-policy, --require-d3d12-gpu-memory-evidence, --require-debug-profiling-policy, --require-d3d12-debug-profiling-evidence, --require-renderer-quality-gates, --require-framegraph-multiqueue-evidence, --require-native-ui-overlay, --require-native-ui-textured-sprite-atlas, Lit Material v0 position+normal+uv/base-color/direct-light shader behavior, backend-neutral D3D12 scene GPU binding counters, postprocess_status=ready, postprocess_depth_input_ready=1, directional_shadow_status=ready, directional_shadow_ready=1, directional_shadow_filter_mode=fixed_pcf_3x3, directional_shadow_filter_taps=9, directional_shadow_filter_radius_texels=1, scene_scale_policy_backend_instancing_evidence_required=1, scene_scale_policy_backend_instancing_evidence_ready=1, d3d12_instanced_draw_execution_status=ready, d3d12_instanced_draw_execution_ready=1, d3d12_instanced_draw_execution_selected=1, d3d12_instanced_draw_execution_expected_instances=6, positive d3d12_instanced_draw_calls/d3d12_instanced_indexed_draw_calls/d3d12_instanced_instances_submitted/rhi_instanced_draw_calls/rhi_instanced_indexed_draw_calls/rhi_instanced_instances_submitted plus d3d12_instanced_draws_ok=1 and d3d12_instanced_instances_ok=1, renderer_quality_status=ready, renderer_quality_ready=1, renderer_quality_diagnostics=0, renderer_quality_expected_framegraph_passes=3, renderer_quality_expected_framegraph_render_passes=6, renderer_quality_expected_framegraph_barrier_steps=15, renderer_quality_framegraph_render_passes_ok=1, renderer_quality_framegraph_barrier_steps_ok=1, renderer_quality_framegraph_execution_budget_ok=1, framegraph_multiqueue_status=ready, framegraph_multiqueue_ready=1, framegraph_multiqueue_diagnostics=0, framegraph_multiqueue_command_lists_submitted=4, framegraph_multiqueue_queue_waits_recorded=3, framegraph_multiqueue_barriers_recorded=4, framegraph_multiqueue_aliasing_barriers_recorded=1, framegraph_multiqueue_pass_callbacks_invoked=4, framegraph_multiqueue_submitted_pass_fences=4, positive framegraph_multiqueue_copy_queue_submits/framegraph_multiqueue_graphics_queue_submits/framegraph_multiqueue_queue_waits, framegraph_multiqueue_graphics_waited_for_copy=1, ui_overlay_status=ready, ui_overlay_ready=1, positive ui_overlay_sprites_submitted/ui_overlay_draws, ui_texture_overlay_status=ready, ui_texture_overlay_atlas_ready=1, positive ui_texture_overlay_sprites_submitted/ui_texture_overlay_texture_binds/ui_texture_overlay_draws, framegraph_passes=3, framegraph_passes_executed=6, framegraph_render_passes_recorded=6, and framegraph_barrier_steps_executed=15.

validationRecipes.name: installed-d3d12-3d-entity-scale-culling-smoke
validationRecipes.purpose: Build the committed generated DesktopRuntime3DPackage proof and validate the lightweight entity scale/culling package smoke with entity_scale_culling_status=planned, entity_scale_culling_ready=1, entity_scale_culling_rows=4, entity_scale_culling_visible_rows=2, entity_scale_culling_culled_rows=2, entity_scale_culling_lod_rows=2, positive projected draw/update costs, entity_scale_culling_budget_protected_rows=1, entity_scale_culling_diagnostics=0, and entity_scale_culling_budget_diagnostics=2 without D3D12/Vulkan renderer selection, scene GPU bindings, gameplay systems, or broad generated 3D production readiness claims.

validationRecipes.name: installed-d3d12-3d-shadow-morph-composition-smoke
validationRecipes.purpose: Build the committed generated DesktopRuntime3DPackage proof and validate the selected D3D12 graphics morph + directional shadow receiver package smoke with shifted shadow receiver artifacts, positive scene_gpu_morph_mesh_bindings, scene_gpu_morph_mesh_resolved, renderer_gpu_morph_draws, renderer_morph_descriptor_binds, directional_shadow_ready=1, fixed_pcf_3x3 filtering, and framegraph_passes=3 without claiming compute morph + shadow composition, morph-deformed shadow-caster silhouettes, Vulkan/Metal parity, public native/RHI handles, or broad renderer quality.

validationRecipes.name: installed-d3d12-3d-native-ui-overlay-smoke
validationRecipes.purpose: Build the committed generated DesktopRuntime3DPackage proof and validate the selected D3D12 native UI overlay HUD box package smoke with generated UI overlay DXIL artifacts, hud_boxes=2, ui_overlay_requested=1, ui_overlay_status=ready, ui_overlay_ready=1, ui_overlay_sprites_submitted=2, ui_overlay_draws=2, and --require-gameplay-systems world_entity_model_* counters for stable entity/component/region ownership, lifecycle rows, persistence/streaming bridge rows, duplicate rejection, invalid-request bridge rejection diagnostics, fail-closed row suppression, addressable_content_* counters for address/dependency/refcount/load/release rows, resident bytes, budget-limited rejection diagnostics, no package IO, no async execution, no commit, and clean diagnostics without claiming textured image-sprite atlas behavior, production text shaping, font rasterization, glyph atlas generation, runtime source image decoding, lifecycle execution, resident mutation, scene mutation, Metal overlay readiness, public native/RHI handles, broad background streaming, or broad generated 3D production readiness.

validationRecipes.name: installed-d3d12-3d-visible-production-proof-smoke
validationRecipes.purpose: Build the committed generated DesktopRuntime3DPackage proof and validate the selected D3D12 visible production-style aggregate with visible_3d_status=ready, visible_3d_ready=1, visible_3d_diagnostics=0, visible_3d_presented_frames=2, D3D12 selection, no NullRenderer fallback, scene GPU, postprocess, renderer-quality, playable_3d, gameplay systems, and native UI overlay readiness while avoiding Vulkan/Metal parity, native/RHI handle exposure, broad renderer quality, or broad generated 3D production readiness claims.

validationRecipes.name: desktop-runtime-release-target-vulkan-visible-production-proof-toolchain-gated
validationRecipes.purpose: On a ready Windows/Vulkan host with DXC SPIR-V CodeGen and spirv-val, build the committed generated DesktopRuntime3DPackage proof and validate the selected Vulkan visible production-style aggregate with visible_3d_status=ready, visible_3d_ready=1, visible_3d_diagnostics=0, visible_3d_presented_frames=2, visible_3d_vulkan_selected=1, no NullRenderer fallback, scene GPU, postprocess, renderer-quality, playable_3d, gameplay systems, and native UI overlay readiness without treating D3D12 proof as cross-backend evidence or claiming Metal parity, native/RHI handle exposure, broad renderer quality, or broad generated 3D production readiness.

validationRecipes.name: installed-d3d12-3d-native-ui-textured-sprite-atlas-smoke
validationRecipes.purpose: Build the committed generated DesktopRuntime3DPackage proof and validate the selected D3D12 cooked UI atlas image-sprite package smoke with generated UI overlay DXIL artifacts, runtime/assets/3d/hud.uiatlas, hud_images=2, ui_atlas_metadata_status=ready, ui_atlas_metadata_pages=1, ui_atlas_metadata_bindings=1, ui_texture_overlay_status=ready, ui_texture_overlay_atlas_ready=1, ui_texture_overlay_sprites_submitted=2, ui_texture_overlay_texture_binds=2, and ui_texture_overlay_draws=2 without claiming production text shaping, font rasterization, glyph atlas generation, runtime source image decoding, source image atlas packing, Metal overlay readiness, public native/RHI handles, or broad generated 3D production readiness.

validationRecipes.name: installed-d3d12-3d-native-ui-text-glyph-atlas-smoke
validationRecipes.purpose: Build the committed generated DesktopRuntime3DPackage proof and validate the selected D3D12 cooked UI atlas text-glyph package smoke with generated UI overlay DXIL artifacts, runtime/assets/3d/hud_text.uiatlas, hud_text_glyphs=2, text_glyphs_available=2, text_glyphs_resolved=2, text_glyphs_missing=0, text_glyph_sprites_submitted=2, ui_atlas_metadata_status=ready, ui_atlas_metadata_pages=1, ui_atlas_metadata_bindings=0, ui_atlas_metadata_glyphs=1, ui_texture_overlay_status=ready, ui_texture_overlay_atlas_ready=1, ui_texture_overlay_sprites_submitted=2, ui_texture_overlay_texture_binds=2, and ui_texture_overlay_draws=2 without claiming production text shaping, font rasterization, glyph atlas generation, runtime source image decoding, source image atlas packing, Metal overlay readiness, public native/RHI handles, or broad generated 3D production readiness.

validationRecipes.name: desktop-runtime-sample-game-vulkan-scene-gpu-package
validationRecipes.purpose: On a ready Windows/Vulkan host with DXC SPIR-V CodeGen and spirv-val, build the selected non-shell desktop runtime package lane and validate installed sample_desktop_runtime_game with target-specific scene/postprocess/shadow SPIR-V artifacts plus the sample-owned Vulkan mapping compute SPIR-V proof artifact, --require-vulkan-renderer smoke args, --require-scene-gpu-bindings, --require-postprocess, --require-postprocess-depth-input, --require-directional-shadow, --require-directional-shadow-filtering, --require-renderer-quality-gates, Lit Material v0 position+normal+uv/base-color/direct-light shader behavior, presentation_selected=vulkan, postprocess_status=ready, postprocess_depth_input_ready=1, directional_shadow_status=ready, directional_shadow_ready=1, directional_shadow_filter_mode=fixed_pcf_3x3, directional_shadow_filter_taps=9, directional_shadow_filter_radius_texels=1, renderer_quality_status=ready, renderer_quality_expected_framegraph_render_passes=6, renderer_quality_expected_framegraph_barrier_steps=15, renderer_quality_framegraph_render_passes_ok=1, renderer_quality_framegraph_barrier_steps_ok=1, renderer_quality_framegraph_execution_budget_ok=1, framegraph_passes=3, framegraph_passes_executed=6, framegraph_render_passes_recorded=6, framegraph_barrier_steps_executed=15, and backend-neutral Vulkan scene GPU binding counters.

validationRecipes.name: desktop-runtime-sample-game-native-ui-overlay-package
validationRecipes.purpose: Build the selected non-shell desktop runtime package lane and validate installed sample_desktop_runtime_game on the primary D3D12 Windows path with renderer-owned native GPU runtime UI overlay output for MK_ui_renderer box/image-placeholder sprite submissions, target-specific UI overlay DXIL artifacts, ui_overlay_requested=1, ui_overlay_status=ready, ui_overlay_ready=1, and positive ui_overlay_sprites_submitted/ui_overlay_draws while keeping production text/font/image/atlas/accessibility unsupported.

validationRecipes.name: desktop-runtime-sample-game-vulkan-native-ui-overlay-package
validationRecipes.purpose: On a ready Windows/Vulkan host with DXC SPIR-V CodeGen and spirv-val, validate the same renderer-owned native GPU runtime UI overlay proof through strict Vulkan package smoke with target-specific UI overlay SPIR-V artifacts plus the sample-owned Vulkan mapping compute SPIR-V proof artifact, presentation_selected=vulkan, ui_overlay_requested=1, ui_overlay_status=ready, ui_overlay_ready=1, and positive ui_overlay_sprites_submitted/ui_overlay_draws.

validationRecipes.name: desktop-runtime-sample-game-textured-ui-atlas-package
validationRecipes.purpose: Build the selected non-shell desktop runtime package lane and validate installed sample_desktop_runtime_game on the primary D3D12 Windows path with a renderer-owned sampled UI sprite bound from cooked texture metadata through UiRendererImageBinding atlas_page/uv_rect, --require-native-ui-textured-sprite-atlas, ui_texture_overlay_requested=1, ui_texture_overlay_status=ready, ui_texture_overlay_atlas_ready=1, and positive ui_texture_overlay_sprites_submitted/ui_texture_overlay_texture_binds/ui_texture_overlay_draws while runtime image decoding and production atlas/editor/runtime integration beyond the reviewed source-image decode and atlas-packing tools, text/font/accessibility, Metal, public native handles, and broad UI renderer quality remain unsupported.

validationRecipes.name: desktop-runtime-sample-game-vulkan-textured-ui-atlas-package
validationRecipes.purpose: On a ready Windows/Vulkan host with DXC SPIR-V CodeGen and spirv-val, validate the same cooked texture/atlas-backed UI sprite proof through strict Vulkan package smoke with target-specific UI overlay SPIR-V artifacts plus the sample-owned Vulkan mapping compute SPIR-V proof artifact, presentation_selected=vulkan, ui_texture_overlay_requested=1, ui_texture_overlay_status=ready, ui_texture_overlay_atlas_ready=1, and positive ui_texture_overlay_sprites_submitted/ui_texture_overlay_texture_binds/ui_texture_overlay_draws.

validationRecipes.name: desktop-runtime-sample-game-ui-atlas-metadata-package
validationRecipes.purpose: Build the selected sample_desktop_runtime_game desktop runtime package and validate that first-party cooked UI atlas package metadata is installed, loaded through MK_runtime, converted into UiRendererImagePalette bindings by MK_ui_renderer, and reported with ui_atlas_metadata_status=ready, ui_atlas_metadata_pages=1, ui_atlas_metadata_bindings=1, plus the existing ready textured UI overlay fields.

validationRecipes.name: desktop-runtime-sample-game-vulkan-ui-atlas-metadata-package
validationRecipes.purpose: On a ready Windows/Vulkan host with DXC SPIR-V CodeGen, spirv-val, and Vulkan runtime readiness, validate the same UI atlas package metadata proof through strict Vulkan package smoke with the sample-owned Vulkan mapping compute SPIR-V proof artifact, presentation_selected=vulkan, framegraph_passes=3, ui_atlas_metadata_status=ready, ui_atlas_metadata_pages=1, ui_atlas_metadata_bindings=1, and ready textured UI overlay counters.

validationRecipes.name: shader-toolchain
validationRecipes.purpose: Report D3D12 DXIL, Vulkan SPIR-V, DXC SPIR-V CodeGen, spirv-val, Metal, and metallib readiness, using MK_SHADER_TOOLCHAIN_ROOT, User/Machine PATH, Vulkan SDK variables, vcpkg tool roots, and Windows SDK fallback discovery.

validationRecipes.name: dev-windows-editor-game-module-driver-load-tests
validationRecipes.purpose: On Windows with MSVC dev preset tooling, configure dev, build MK_editor_game_module_driver_probe and MK_editor_game_module_driver_load_tests, and run CTest MK_editor_game_module_driver_load_tests for same-engine-build DLL load, factory resolution, isolated session tick, stopped-state unload plus second load, and paired DynamicLibrary refcount ordering without mirakana_editor execution, active-session hot reload, or stable third-party ABI claims.

validationRecipes.name: dependency-policy
validationRecipes.purpose: Verify vcpkg, dependency docs, and third-party notice policy.

validationRecipes.name: asset-importers
validationRecipes.purpose: Validate optional PNG, glTF, and common audio source importer adapters behind MK_tools.

validationRecipes.name: physics-jolt
validationRecipes.purpose: Validate the optional Jolt Physics adapter lane behind MK_physics_jolt, including physics-jolt configure/build/CTest, install/export, and an installed SDK consumer that links mirakana::physics_jolt when Mirakanai_HAS_PHYSICS_JOLT is true.

validationRecipes.name: network-production-security
validationRecipes.purpose: Validate the first-party networking production security gate, networking foundation, transport adapter facade, and replication review tests, including threat-model, session lifecycle, connection state, channel policy, sequence/replay rejection, input command validation, snapshot validation, rollback-window diagnostics, and host-gated loopback/replication separation without broad online-service claims.

validationRecipes.name: audio-production
validationRecipes.purpose: Validate Audio Production Playback/Streaming/DSP/Spatialization Evidence v1, including review_audio_production_readiness over decoded source, streaming chunk, conversion, budget, DSP graph, spatial/listener, HRTF host-gate, device lifecycle, unsupported-claim, side-effect, selected-package, production-readiness, diagnostic, and replay-hash rows plus SDL3 callback-free device lifecycle evidence without broad codec, middleware, HRTF execution, background streaming, native-handle, or general production audio quality claims.

validationRecipes.name: desktop-runtime-2d-audio-production-proof
validationRecipes.purpose: Build the selected 2D desktop runtime package proof and validate audio_production_* counters for reviewed decoded source, streaming chunk, conversion, DSP, spatial/listener, HRTF host gate, SDL3 device lifecycle, unsupported-claim, side-effect, diagnostic, and replay-hash evidence. Installed validation expects audio_production_status=host_evidence_required, selected package evidence ready, device and HRTF host evidence unavailable, zero codec/background/middleware/HRTF/device-callback/device-IO side effects, two host-gate diagnostics, and a positive replay hash without claiming broad codec support, middleware parity, HRTF execution parity, background streaming execution, native handles, or general production audio quality.

validationRecipes.name: desktop-runtime-3d-audio-production-proof
validationRecipes.purpose: Build the selected generated 3D desktop runtime package proof and validate audio_production_* counters from the cooked gameplay audio payload. Installed validation expects audio_production_status=host_evidence_required, selected package evidence ready, device and HRTF host evidence unavailable, zero codec/background/middleware/HRTF/device-callback/device-IO side effects, two host-gate diagnostics, and a positive replay hash without claiming broad codec support, middleware parity, HRTF execution parity, background streaming execution, native handles, or general production audio quality.

validationRecipes.name: network-enet
validationRecipes.purpose: Validate the optional ENet network adapter lane behind MK_runtime_network_enet, including network-enet configure/build/CTest for the transport adapter and production security gate targets, local reliable/unreliable loopback host evidence, install/export, and an installed SDK consumer that links mirakana::runtime_network_enet when Mirakanai_HAS_NETWORK_ENET is true.

validationRecipes.name: release-package
validationRecipes.purpose: Build Release, run Release tests, validate installed SDK metadata, validate an installed SDK consumer project, create the CPack package artifact, validate the current ZIP SHA-256 sidecar, and inspect archived SDK metadata/tool/doc/license entries.

validationRecipes.name: installed-sdk
validationRecipes.purpose: Validate installed SDK metadata payloads, then build examples/installed_consumer against an installed GameEngine package without source-tree include paths.

validationRecipes.name: mobile-packaging
validationRecipes.purpose: Validate mobile packaging templates and report Android SDK/NDK/JDK/Gradle/AVD/device or Apple full-Xcode/iOS-SDK/iOS-runtime blockers explicitly without faking package readiness.

validationRecipes.name: ios-simulator-smoke
validationRecipes.purpose: On macOS/Xcode hosts, build the iOS Simulator bundle, install it with xcrun simctl, verify the app container, launch it, and clean up the simulator state.
